TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 'Oponoho == Itiniay i Maolin Cen no Kaohsiung (o Takaw han no Pangcah ko Kaohsiung) ko Oponoho a niyaro', 133 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 406 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 390 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Rukai 85%, Paiwan 7%, Bunun 2%, Tayal 1%. Ira ko imeng atoi niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Talihafan
S.PHON: == ʡo~upo~uno~uħo~u == itiniaj i mao~uɾin ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ (o~u takaw ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ) ko~u o~upo~uno~uħo~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ro~u~ukai **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%. ira ko~u iməŋ ato~ui nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. taɾiħafan
S.FORM: == 'Oponoho == Itiniay i Maolin Cen no Kaohsiung (o Takaw han no Pangcah ko Kaohsiung) ko Oponoho a niyaro', 133 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 406 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 390 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Rukai 85%, Paiwan 7%, Bunun 2%, Tayal 1%. Ira ko imeng atoi niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Talihafan
S.PHON: == ʡo~upo~uno~uħo~u == itiniaj i mao~uɾin ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ (o~u takaw ħan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ) ko~u o~upo~uno~uħo~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ro~u~ukai **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%. ira ko~u iməŋ ato~ui nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. taɾiħafan
